mildew_milioncast: Gilles, T., Phelps, K., Clarkson, J.P. & Kennedy, R. (2004). Development of MILIONCAST, an Improved Model for Predicting Downy Mildew Sporulation on Onions. Plant Disease 88(7): 695–702.

Cornell Vegetables — Carrot Leaf Blight Diseases and their Management (vegetables.cornell.edu).
UC IPM — Alternaria Leaf Blight / Carrot: Pest Management Guidelines (ipm.ucanr.edu).

UW Vegetable Pathology — Brassica Alternaria Leaf Spot (vegpath.plantpath.wisc.edu).
bot_squamosa: Sutton, J.C., James, T.D.W. & Rowell, P.M. (1986). BOTCAST: a forecasting system to time the initial fungicide spray for managing Botrytis leaf blight of onions. Agriculture, Ecosystems & Environment 18(2): 123–143.

Williamson, B., Tudzynski, B., Tudzynski, P. & van Kan, J.A.L. (2007). Botrytis cinerea: the cause of grey mould disease. Molecular Plant Pathology 8(5): 561–580.
Nota: modelo de infección genérico basado en umbrales T × mojado de literatura; B. cinerea no cuenta con un modelo cuantitativo específico consensuado como BOTCAST.
sclero: Clarkson, J.P., Phelps, K., Whipps, J.M., Young, C.S., Smith, J.A. & Watling, M. (2007). Forecasting Sclerotinia Disease on Lettuce: A Predictive Model for Carpogenic Germination of Sclerotinia sclerotiorum Sclerotia. Phytopathology 97(5): 621–631.

allii: Furuya, H., Takanashi, H., Fuji, S., Nagai, Y. & Naito, H. (2009). Modeling Infection of Spring Onion by Puccinia allii in Response to Temperature and Leaf Wetness. Phytopathology 99(8): 951–956.
